name: Codex Bridge API Manifest
purpose: Executable intake layer separating ChatGPT proposals from validated evidence and Codex-produced artifacts.
evidence_discipline_rules: ChatGPT may propose requests but may not directly modify evidence outputs.
Published evidence snapshots are read-only from ChatGPT.
User claims remain hypotheses unless independently sourced.
Anomalies are not proof; preserve uncertainty and provenance.
Use unknown instead of guessing when values are missing.

gist_write_restrictions.rule: No script writes directly to the public evidence Gist unless explicitly configured with credentials and an intentional publish command.
